title: bomarea crocea
intro: Bomarea crocea, also known as the yellow or golden bomarea, is a flowering plant species in the family Alstroemeriaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Bomarea crocea include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Bomarea crocea can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to harness its medicinal properties.
